chunks.text: C.P No.D-4542 of 2016 1 HIGH COURT OF SINDH, KARACHI C.P No.D-4542 of 2016 Present Mr.Justice Mohammad Ali Mazhar Mr. Justice Adnan-ul-Karim Memon Rehman, Petitioner, through: Mr. Jamil Ahmed Virk, advocate Inspector General of Police and: through Mr. Abdul Jaleel Zubedi others a/w Musadiq Amjad Bukhari, DSP Legal Date of Hearing: 23-12-2016 Date of Order: 23-12-2016 O R D E R MOHAMMAD ALI MAZHAR---J.,The basic contention of the learned counsel is that the petitioner is entitled to attend Lower School Course. On the contrary the AAG submitted that the maximum age for the Course is thirty three years and the Petitioner is over age. However; he has submitted the comments along with letter dated 16th February, 2016 in which a proposal has been given to the Inspector General of Police by Deputy Inspector General of Police (Administration) to enhance the age of Lower School Course from thirty three years to thirty eight years including other Courses but the matter is pending with the Home Department. 2. The learned counsel for the Petitioner submits that at present the petitioner is aged about thirty three years and few months only. 3. Since a favourable proposal has already been floated to the Inspector General of Police and the matter is pending at his end to decide the issue. Let the decision on the concerned proposal be taken within sixty days. The Petition is disposed of accordingly with further direction that if C.P No.D-4542 of 2016 2 the age for attending the Lower School Course is enhanced from thirty three years to thirty eight years then naturally the Petitioner will be given the benefit of this extension and he will be sent to join the said Course.

Let the decision on the concerned proposal be taken within sixty days. The Petition is disposed of accordingly with further direction that if C.P No.D-4542 of 2016 2 the age for attending the Lower School Course is enhanced from thirty three years to thirty eight years then naturally the Petitioner will be given the benefit of this extension and he will be sent to join the said Course.
